_comment: TRACK: Dynamic Road Network and Trajectory Representation Learning
_paper: TRACK: Learning to Track and Represent Trajectories for Traffic Forecasting
_regularization: Dropout and drop path for regularization
_spatial_encoding: GAT layers for spatial feature extraction
_temporal_windows: Input/output sequence lengths (default: 12 steps = 1 hour with 5-min intervals)
_gradient_clipping: Gradient norm clipping to stabilize training
_dataset_compatibility: Works with TrafficStatePointDataset - compatible with METR_LA, PEMS_BAY, PEMSD3-8, etc.
_requirements: Requires adjacency matrix (adj_mx) in data_feature for graph structure. Optional: node_features for enhanced spatial encoding
_loss_function: Default masked MAE loss from TrafficStateExecutor
